title: Fixes #11897: Add Stable Audio 3 via Stability's official API
author: sharktide
pr_body_excerpt:
Add Stable Audio 3 via Stability's official API 

Close #11897

gist.headline: The hive makes some noise
gist.blurb: Stable Audio 3 has officially landed in the API. Time to turn those text prompts into high-quality beats and soundscapes.
gist.summary: Added Stable Audio 3 to the audio generation endpoints via Stability's official API.
gist.impact: Developers can now pass `stable-audio-3` to the audio API to generate high-quality music and sound effects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing DJ headphones interacting with a retro synthesizer or boombox, representing the new Stable Audio 3 integration. The Monitor Robot dancing to the new beats.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, hovering over a retro synthesizer that is sprouting musical notes and code-plants. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head dances nearby holding a cassette tape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'AUDIO 3'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, hovering over a retro synthesizer that is sprouting musical notes and code-plants.
